clips.title: Cafe Rain
clips.prompt: Soft watercolor painting style, translucent washes, bleeding colors, visible paper texture, loose delicate edges. Present day. A charming street cafe under gentle rain, wet cobblestones with soft reflections, striped awning, glowing windows. Evening, rainy. A person in a light coat sits at an outdoor table under the awning with a warm drink, watching the rain. An umbrella, a coffee cup, blurred passersby. Soft warm glow bleeding into cool rain, watercolor washes. Slow dolly in. Delicate watercolor aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Blossom Walk
clips.prompt: Soft watercolor painting style, translucent washes, bleeding colors, visible paper texture, loose delicate edges. Present day. A park path beneath cherry blossom trees, soft pink petals drifting, a pond beyond. Morning, gentle. A person in a spring outfit strolls the path, glancing up at the blossoms, petals falling around them. A bench, a bicycle, floating petals. Soft pink and green washes, airy light. Side tracking. Serene watercolor aesthetic, 24fps.
